message.content:
@startuml
title US031 - As Team Member, I want to create a task in a user story

actor TeamMember
boundary ":CreateUSTaskUI" as UI
control ":CreateUSTaskController" as C
participant Company
participant "taskTypeStore\n:TaskTypeStore" as TaskTypeStore
participant "taskTypeList\n:List<TaskType>" as TaskTypeList
participant "taskType\n:TaskType" as TaskType
participant "taskTypesNames\n:List<String>" as TaskTypesNames

participant "pStore\n:ProjectStore" as PStore
participant "proj\n:project" as Proj
participant "sList\n:SprintList" as SList
participant "sprint\n:Sprint" as Sprint
participant "sprintBacklog" as SprintBacklog
participant "userStoryList" as UserStoryList
participant "Us" as Us
participant "UsTaskList\n:TaskList" as UsTaskList

participant "taskList\n:List<Task>" as TaskList
participant "task\n:Task" as Task
participant "tasksNames\n:List<String>" as TasksNames

participant "projectTeam\n:ProjectTeam" as ProjectTeam
participant "projectTeam\n:List<Resource>" as ProjectTeamList
participant "resource\n:Resource" as Resource
participant "currentResName\n:List<String>" as CurrentResName

participant ":TaskMapper" as TaskMapper
participant "createTaskDTO\n:CreateTaskDTO" as CreateTaskDTO
participant "newTask\n:Task" as NewTask

TeamMember -> UI : 1 Ask to create a task of a user story
UI -> C : 2 getTaskTypes()
C -> Company : 3 getTaskTypeStore()
Company --> C : 4 taskTypeStore
C -> TaskTypeStore : 5 getTaskTypesNames()
TaskTypeStore -> TaskTypesNames : 6 create()

loop for each know task type
  TaskTypeStore -> TaskTypeList : 7 get(i)
  TaskTypeList --> TaskTypeStore : 8 taskType
  TaskTypeStore -> TaskType : 9 getName()
  TaskType --> TaskTypeStore : 10 typeName
  TaskTypeStore -> TaskTypesNames : 11 add(typeName)
  TaskTypeStore --> TaskTypeStore : 12 true
end

TaskTypeStore --> C : 13 taskTypesNames
C --> UI : 14 taskTypesNames
UI --> TeamMember : 15 Show a list of task types
TeamMember -> UI : 16 Selects task type

UI -> C : 17 getUSTaskInfo(projCode, sprintID, uId)
C -> Company : 18 getProjectStore()
Company --> C : 19 pStore
C -> PStore : 20 getProjectByCode(projCode)
PStore --> C : 21 proj
C -> Proj : 22 getSprints()
Proj --> C : 23 sList
C -> SList : 24 getSprint(sprintID)
SList --> C : 25 sprint
C -> Sprint : 26 getBacklog()
Sprint --> C : 27 sprintBacklog
C -> SprintBacklog : 28 getUsList()
SprintBacklog --> C : 29 usList
C -> UserStoryList : 30 getUserStory(uId)
UserStoryList --> C : 31 Us
C -> Us : 32 getUsTaskList()
Us --> C : 33 usTaskList
C -> UsTaskList : 34 getTasksNames()
UsTaskList -> TasksNames : 35 create()

loop for each know task
  UsTaskList -> TaskList : 36 get(i)
  TaskList --> UsTaskList : 37 task
  UsTaskList -> Task : 38 getName()
  Task --> UsTaskList : 39 taskName
  UsTaskList -> TasksNames : 40 add(taskName)
  UsTaskList --> UsTaskList : 41 true
end

UsTaskList --> C : 42 tasksNames
C --> UI : 43 tasksNames
UI --> TeamMember : 44 Show a list of current tasks (to choose a precedence, if want)
TeamMember -> UI : 45 Select precedence (optional)

UI -> C : 46 getCurrentProjectTeam()
C -> Proj : 47 getProjectTeam()
Proj --> C : 48 projectTeam
C -> ProjectTeam : 49 getCurrentResourcesNames()
ProjectTeam -> CurrentResName : 50 create()

loop for each know resource
  ProjectTeam -> ProjectTeamList : 51 get(i)
  ProjectTeamList --> ProjectTeam : 52 resource
  ProjectTeam -> Resource : 53 isCurrent()
  Resource --> ProjectTeam : 54 result
  alt result == true
    ProjectTeam -> Resource : 55 getName()
    Resource --> ProjectTeam : 56 resourceName
    ProjectTeam -> CurrentResName : 57 add(resourceName)
    ProjectTeam --> ProjectTeam : 58 true
  end
end

ProjectTeam --> C : 59 currentResourcesNames
C --> UI : 60 currentResourcesNames
UI --> TeamMember : 61 Shows resource list and request data (1) name, description, effortEstimate, taskType, responsible
TeamMember -> UI : 62 Choose and typed requested data

UI -> C : 63 createUSTask(createTaskDTO)
C -> TaskMapper : 64 createUSTask(createTaskDTO)
TaskMapper -> CreateTaskDTO : 65 toModel(createTaskDTO)

CreateTaskDTO -> CreateTaskDTO : 66 name = getName()
CreateTaskDTO -> CreateTaskDTO : 67 description = getDescription()
CreateTaskDTO -> CreateTaskDTO : 68 effortEstimate = getEffortEstimate()
CreateTaskDTO -> CreateTaskDTO : 69 taskType = getTaskType()
CreateTaskDTO -> CreateTaskDTO : 70 responsible = getResponsible()

CreateTaskDTO -> NewTask : 71 createTask(name, description,\neffortEstimate, taskType, responsible)
TaskMapper --> C : 72 newTask
C -> UsTaskList : 73 add(newTask)
C -> UsTaskList : 74 validate(newTask)
C -> UsTaskList : 75 add(newTask)
UsTaskList --> C : 76 true
C --> UI : 77 created and saved successfully
UI --> TeamMember : 78 created and saved successfully

@enduml
